riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX 16.67 — normal regime (15-20). Low fear, complacent but not extreme. Premium selling favorable.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Tech (QQQ) leading; REITs and crypto-correlated names weak. Energy/utilities showing defensive strength. Solar sub-sector hot.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: 4 names before open (FDS, GIS, MSM, UNF) + 1 after close (GBX). IV crush risk on all; 0DTE setups prohibited on these tickers.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: July 4th holiday shortened week (Friday market close). FOMC minutes digest, no major macro data today. Liquidity may thin Thursday.
